reviews.comment:
Cargas combustibles o te hacen servis mientras podes disfrutar en la confiteria un buen cafe. buen lugar para reunion cerrar negocios no mas de 6 personas

(Translated by Google)
You can fill up your tank or get serviced while enjoying a good coffee in the café. It's a good place for meetings or closing business deals (no more than 6 people).

reviews.comment:
Todo muy bien con ACA Salta capital. La ubicación no podría ser mejor , sumado a la atención del personal. Las instalaciones son buenas y modernas, aunque el sitio para cargar combustible es del tamaño justo y si hay muchos autos hay que hacer fila en la calle. El resto de los servicios ofrecidos también de primera

(Translated by Google)
Everything was great at ACA Salta capital. The location couldn't be better, and the staff was very attentive. The facilities are good and modern, although the fuel pump is just the right size, and if there are a lot of cars, you have to wait in line outside. The rest of the services offered were also excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15724533271079356908/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZc01ucXN3RRAB
